title: The Russia Contingency with Michael Kofman Archives
gist: An archive/tag index page listing episodes of The Russia Contingency podcast with Michael Kofman; not a substantive article, but the episode titles trace the show's recurring focus on Russian military power, the Ukraine front line, European security, and Russia's oil sector.

insights.claim: One listed Russia Contingency episode (April 16, 2026) is titled 'Despite Rising Prices, Russia's Oil Sector is in a Tight Spot,' indicating analysis of Russian oil under price stress.
insights.speaker: War on the Rocks
insights.so_what: Only a title-level pointer; signals Russian oil-sector strain as a topic to source from the actual episode, not this index.
insights.quote: Despite Rising Prices, Russia’s Oil Sector is in a Tight Spot

insights.claim: The archive shows the podcast's recurring coverage of European security policy and Ukraine front-line realities, including a June 5, 2026 episode 'Towards a Transformed European Security Policy.'
insights.speaker: War on the Rocks
insights.so_what: Index-level only; confirms the show as a recurring source on European security and the Ukraine war.
insights.quote: Towards a Transformed European Security Policy
